products.name: SocLeads 3.0
products.tagline: Scrape emails from socials and maps by location
products.description: SocLeads now scrapes emails from Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and Google Maps across entire countries 🌍📧 Geo-filters. More results. No code needed. 🚀

products.name: LobeHub
products.tagline: Your Chief Agent Operator for multi-agent work
products.description: LobeHub is a Chief Agent Operator (CAO) that builds, runs, and coordinates your AI agent team. Describe a goal, and it assembles the right agents/skills, runs tasks in parallel in the cloud, routes work across models, and reports back only when decisions are needed—via your existing channels (Slack/Discord/Telegram/iMessage). Less tab-switching, more outcomes.

products.name: ReactVision Studio
products.tagline: Build AR/VR Apps in React Native + ship directly to devices
products.description: A browser-based visual editor for building AR & VR scenes. Drag and drop 3D objects, generate assets with AI, then ship natively to iOS, Android, and Meta Quest from a single React Native codebase. Open source renderer, Expo-compatible, 100K+ npm installs.

products.name: Shadow
products.tagline: AI computer screen and voice control with custom automation
products.description: Shadow is the AI interface for your Mac. It sees your screen, hears your voice, and runs the prompts you build — on a keyboard shortcut, or in your meetings. 🪄 Skills do the work. Quick Reply drafts emails from what you say and what’s on screen. Voice Typing turns talking into clean text, anywhere. Meeting Skills capture every word and screen, then deliver notes and follow-ups the moment you hang up. Build your own — every Skill is a prompt, a context, and an output.

products.name: M1 by Montage
products.tagline: Agentic UI that scales on demand
products.description: AI agents render UI slowly, expensively, inconsistently and inference bills balloon from it. Montage fixes it: emit a tiny intent schema, we compile production components server-side: 10x faster, 50-100x fewer tokens, model and framework agnostic. Now one M1 API call generates rich interactive visuals, hosts them as live UIs with persistent state, and styles to your brand. Don't let your agents reinvent UI every turn - ship them on Montage!

products.name: Searchad.ai
products.tagline: Run Apple Search Ads by Chatting with AI
products.description: Cursor for Apple Search Ads. Run Apple Search Ads campaigns in every country just by chatting. The AI is read-only by default, and nothing deploys, pauses, or spends a cent without your explicit approval. See your ROAS, manage the campaigns with just chatting. Work for every country that Apple Ads supported.

products.name: Origio
products.tagline: A personalized way to discover where to live
products.description: Most relocation tools give you generic city comparisons. Origio personalises it. Answer 8 questions about your job, passport, rent budget and priorities and it scores 25 countries by salary after tax, visa difficulty for your nationality, cost of living and quality of life. Free tier shows your top 3 matches. Pro unlocks all 25, a salary calculator, full visa checklist and a 3-country comparison. One-time payment, no subscription.

products.name: Polarity
products.tagline: The Self-Improvement Stack For agents
products.description: Polarity monitors every agent decision in production, surfaces failure patterns before users hit them, and turns trajectories into evals that compound your agent’s reliability over time!

products.name: Moody
products.tagline: Your Mac wallpaper that listens to your music & weather
products.description: 🎵 Music-reactive. ☔ Weather-aware. 🎯 Focus-syncing. MOODy turns your Mac desktop into a living surface — six smart modes that match your music, weather, mood, and time of day. 4K wallpapers, multi-monitor, macOS 14.6+.

products.name: Krea 2
products.tagline: An image model built for style control and moodboards
products.description: Create expressive AI images with Krea 2, Krea AI's in-house foundation model for aesthetic diversity, style control, moodboards, and creative workflows.

products.name: Triggered Agents by Adaptive
products.tagline: AI agents that run automatically on business events
products.description: Adaptive lets you attach AI agents to events in your business tools so they act automatically when a trigger fires. For founders and operators running multi-tool workflows.

products.name: Draft
products.tagline: Capture AI chats into your knowledge base
products.description: Draft captures valuable answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, vertical chatbots, then turns them into editable, searchable notes. Preserve formatting, organize insights, listen with text-to-speech, keep your knowledge available offline, and share when you choose. Free to use at Beta;

products.name: LandingHero AI
products.tagline: 24/7 Salesperson on Your Website
products.description: Most visitors land on your website, have questions, and leave without answers. You never get to know what they were looking for. LandingHero creates an AI version of you that talks to every visitor using voice, in their language. It answers questions, guides visitors across your site, and captures leads. Plug in your URL & turn your website into a 24/7 salesperson.

products.name: pixserp
products.tagline: Your LLM on the live web. One endpoint, ten answer shapes.
products.description: pixserp is the AI-native search engine for builders. One endpoint, ten live-web answer shapes — search, news, images, places, shopping, flights, hotels, YouTube, transcripts, any URL — cited by default. Drop-in for the OpenAI SDK. Flat $1.50 / 1k requests.

products.name: SizzleAir
products.tagline: Thermal assistant for fanless MacBook Airs
products.description: SizzleAir is a tiny macOS thermal assistant built specifically for fanless MacBook Airs. Instead of another sensor wall, it turns thermal pressure, workload context, external display or clamshell state, and top CPU usage into one clear status, likely cause, and practical next step. No fake cooling, no fan control, no giant dashboard.

products.name: Voiser AI
products.tagline: Human-like AI voiceovers in 140+ languages
products.description: Voiser helps creators, teams, and businesses turn text into the most human like AI voiceovers. With 140+ languages, 1000+ voices, emotional voice styles, custom instructions, and fast generation, you can create realistic voiceovers for videos, ads, training content, podcasts, and global projects in minutes.

products.name: AnyFrame
products.tagline: Sandboxes for your AI agents
products.description: Hand-rolling sandboxes for every agent gets old fast. AnyFrame gives you a control plane: define an agent once, boot a session in seconds, drive it from the web UI or Python SDK on the same channel. Claude Code, Codex, your harness.

products.name: QuickRight
products.tagline: The missing right-click features for macOS Finder
products.description: QuickRight adds the missing right-click features to macOS Finder. Create new files instantly, use true Cut & Paste, open Terminal or Warp in the current folder, copy file paths, move files faster, compress images, extract colors, check hashes, and more — all directly from Finder’s context menu. Built for macOS users who work with files every day.

products.name: Agentspan
products.tagline: Open-source runtime for durable AI agents
products.description: Agentspan is an open-source server and SDK for running AI agents as durable workflows. You can define agents programmatically, execute them server-side, and inspect each run and execution state in the UI. Agentspan adds crash recovery, human-in-the-loop approvals, guardrails, tool history, and observability around the agent frameworks and LLMs you already use. MIT licensed.

products.name: The Claude Code Daily
products.tagline: Claude Code news. Curated Daily.
products.description: Keeping up with Claude Code is a full-time job. New releases, community tips, and workflows are scattered across X. The Claude Code Daily fixes that. Every weekday morning, the top posts are distilled into a 2-minute digest delivered to your inbox.

products.name: BeyondComments
products.tagline: Turn YouTube comments into channel growth, in 45 seconds!
products.description: BeyondComments analyzes every YouTube comment on your video and turns them into actionable signals. Sentiment analysis, content ideas, sponsor outreach, high-intent fans, and a virality score. Paste any YouTube URL and get a full AI briefing in 45 seconds.

products.name: Perceptron Mk1
products.tagline: Frontier video reasoning for the physical world
products.description: Perceptron Mk1 brings frontier video and embodied reasoning to production APIs, with temporal grounding, structured visual outputs, 32K multimodal context, and pricing built for high-volume physical-world tasks.

products.name: Elmo
products.tagline: Open Source AEO
products.description: Tired of spending $400/mo on Profound? With Elmo, you can track all of your prompts on any AI search provider or LLM, compare your AI visibility against your competitors, and dive into the details about which websites/Reddit threads/etc are cited by AI. You can also self-host on system with Docker Compose and own your own data.

products.name: NonBioS.ai
products.tagline: The AI Software Dev with its own Computer
products.description: NonBioS is an AI software engineer that runs on its own Linux machine. Every user gets a dedicated machine the agent fully controls - 4GB RAM, a public IP, and root access. NonBioS can install anything, run anything, open ports, and deploy. We have obsessed over our context engineering architecture - called Strategic Forgetting, which helps keep focus on long running tasks and handle complex codebase. NonBioS shares its plan upfront, streams every step, and lets you interrupt/redirect anytime.

products.name: Orlume
products.tagline: AI that builds websites that looks crafted by top designers.
products.description: Most AI website builders feel like copy-paste machines. Orlume is different. You don’t get templates, you get taste. Describe your idea and it turns into a clean, high-end website with real structure, sharp layouts, and that “this was actually designed” feel. No endless tweaking, no generic outputs. Just fast, unique, polished websites for founders, creators, and startups who care about how their product looks.

products.name: Dovilo
products.tagline: The first agent-native, gamified task manager and focus app.
products.description: Dovilo turns your to-do list into a city you actually build. Complete tasks, stay focused with Pomodoro timers, and raise an isometric town that grows with your productivity. Agent-native: the built-in MCP server lets Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI and any MCP client execute your AI tasks step-by-step. Enable webhooks to connect your own agentic workflow: new task created, your orchestrator gets notified instantly. Free on iOS, Android, macOS and Windows. Launching May 18.

products.name: Dash by Halaska
products.tagline: Investor-ready design, in a week
products.description: A fixed-price design pass on what investors actually judge: site, product, deck. Ex-Google, ex-Ogilvy. 20 years in design. Founders we've worked with have raised $160M+. Three flat-rate tiers from $2.5K. Interactive prototype, not a Figma file. Investor-ready in a week.

products.name: CaseOdds.ai
products.tagline: AI analyzes your legal case and predicts the odds of success
products.description: Find out if you will win your court case. CaseOdds.ai uses AI to analyze your legal situation and predict the outcome — for free.

products.name: Walk: Routes & Reminders
products.tagline: A minimalist walking tracker
products.description: Walk is the simplest way to track your walks. Record your routes, track your steps, and see your progress over time - all in a beautifully minimal interface. Whether you're taking a quick stroll or building a daily walking habit, Walk keeps track of your time, distance, pace, calories, and elevation. View your walk history with route maps, follow your streaks, and stay motivated with weekly and monthly insights.

products.name: FlintLab Sirius Platform
products.tagline: AI-Native Unified Device Infra PaaS
products.description: FlintLab is an AI-powered Infrastructure Platform as a Service (IPaaS) purpose-built to transform how modern engineering teams test, validate, and ship high-quality software. Our platform provides on-demand access to both real and emulated devices, along with containerized, cloud-native test environments, enabling organizations to simulate production-like conditions at scale, without the overhead of managing complex infrastructure.
